insights: AI/ML integration is now table stakes — foundational for all senior engineering roles, not just specialist positions.
Full-stack proficiency with cloud acumen is in high demand — React, PHP, Laravel, REST APIs combined with AWS.
Leadership extends beyond code — people management and documentation skills mentioned 10+ times this week.
post:
AI/ML, PHP/React, and Cloud (AWS) are the top tech skills in demand this week.

Senior engineers need full-stack versatility and strong product leadership to thrive.

Surprisingly, PHP's robust presence challenges legacy narratives — proving its enduring value.
